title: Operations Manager
description:
We are seeking a dynamic and experienced F&B Operations Manager to oversee and lead the daily operations of our food and beverage outlets. The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring exceptional guest experiences, optimizing profitability, and maintaining high operational standards across all F&B units.

Responsibilities

  • Lead daily operations of all food and beverage outlets including restaurants, bars, room service, banquets, and catering to ensure seamless service delivery and operational excellence
  • Develop and implement operational procedures, service standards, and quality assurance processes to enhance efficiency and guest satisfaction
  • Monitor guest satisfaction metrics and resolve customer complaints promptly and professionally to maintain high service quality
  • Lead, train, and develop F&B staff to foster a positive, productive team environment and improve staff performance
  • Collaborate with the executive chef and kitchen team to maintain menu consistency, food quality, and presentation standards that meet brand expectations
  • Manage inventory, ordering, and vendor relationships to achieve cost-effective purchasing and minimize waste
  • Prepare and manage budgets, forecasts, and financial reports to optimize F&B operational profitability
  • Ensure compliance with health, safety, hygiene, and licensing regulations to maintain a safe and lawful operating environment
  • Coordinate with other departments to plan and execute events, promotions, and private functions that drive business growth
  • Analyze sales, cost control reports, and other performance indicators to identify opportunities for continuous operational improvement

Required competencies and certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field, or equivalent experience
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in F&B management, including at least 2 years in an operations-level leadership role

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Proficiency in POS systems and Microsoft Office to support operational management
  • Knowledge of inventory and scheduling software to enhance resource planning and control
  • Strong leadership, communication, and team management skills demonstrated through leading teams in high-pressure environments
  • Ability to handle high-pressure situations and solve problems efficiently to maintain smooth operations
  • Guest-oriented and service-driven mindset focused on delivering exceptional customer experiences
  • Strong organizational and multitasking abilities to manage multiple operational demands effectively
  • Attention to detail and commitment to quality to uphold brand standards
  • Flexibility to work varied hours including weekends and holidays to meet operational needs
